name: chamados
description: Sistema interno de chamados de TI

scripts.build: npm run build -w @chamados/shared && npm run build -w @chamados/api && npm run build -w @chamados/web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @chamados/shared && concurrently -n shared,api,web -c blue,green,magenta "npm:dev:shared" "npm:dev:api" "npm:dev:web"
